title: metalasia calcicola
intro: Metalasia calcicola, also known as the red metalasia, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting skin healing. In herbal preparations, Metalasia calcicola is often used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to treat minor skin injuries and promote wound healing.
